title: supplier_landed_cost.py output
description: Requires --supplier (always). --component optionally narrows to one component (otherwise all components the supplier touches, after any date filtering, are covered). --startdate/--enddate independently optionally filter order_date (inclusive on both ends). All figures are the target supplier's own data only — no peer comparison. weighted_avg_unit_price and total_actual_cost_per_unit are both spend-weighted (total_spend / total_qty and total_cost / total_qty respectively), NOT a plain mean of unit_cost_usd, since an unweighted mean misrepresents the true average price paid whenever PO sizes vary. total_actual_cost_per_unit is the identical formula supplier_scorecard.py exports under the same field name — the two are directly comparable.

component_breakdown.description: One row per component_category, sorted by total_spend descending. A single row when --component was given.

weighted_avg_unit_price.description: total_spend / total_qty. Spend-weighted, not a plain mean of unit_cost_usd.

criticality_breakdown.description: One row per (component_category, component_criticality) combination present in scope, sorted by total_spend descending.

weighted_avg_unit_price.description: total_spend / total_qty. Spend-weighted, not a plain mean of unit_cost_usd.
